title: Wood Converters!
description: A simple mod that allows you to convert most wood blocks/items into other wood variants!
body:
This mod lets you convert certain blocks and items into its other wood variants using the new wood converter block!

The wood converter has a variant for each type of wood, and every variant can be crafted.

The convertable blocks/items are as follows:

- logs
- stripped logs
- wood
- stripped wood
- planks
- stairs
- slabs
- fences
- fence gates
- doors
- trapdoors
- pressure plates
- buttons
- signs
- hanging signs
- chest boats
- boats

_this mod was created in MCreator_
